title: State public assistance fund
doc_html:
PART II.  RULES AND REGULATIONS

§101.  State public assistance fund

There is established in the state treasury a state public assistance fund which shall consist of all funds made available for the purposes of this Chapter by the state or any of the parishes of this state or from any other source.
doc_text:
PART II.  RULES AND REGULATIONS
§101.  State public assistance fund
There is established in the state treasury a state public assistance fund which shall consist of all funds made available for the purposes of this Chapter by the state or any of the parishes of this state or from any other source.
